name: No Bake Peach Crisp
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (16 ozs each) cling peaches - halves in syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain peaches, reserving liquid for other uses.
2. Combine granola and almonds.
3. Melt butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
4. Blend brown sugar and cinnamon into the melted butter until the sugar is dissolved (about 2 minutes).
5. Toss the mixture with granola and almonds; let it cool completely.
6. In a separate bowl, beat whipping cream with powdered sugar, vanilla, almond extract, and nutmeg until stiff peaks form.
7. Blend in sour cream to the whipped cream mixture.
8. To serve, place two peaches on each serving plate.
9. Top with cream mixture and sprinkle granola mixture over the peaches.
10. Makes 6 servings.
